steps.title: Find the antecedent
steps.content: The blank refers back to "the eating utensils," which are the table forks Damian condemned. Because the antecedent is plural, the pronoun must also be plural and must function as the object of "considered."

steps.title: Rule out singular pronouns
steps.content: B and C are singular demonstratives, and D is a singular pronoun. They cannot agree with the plural antecedent. The plural object pronoun is required. The answer is A.
